steps.title: Determine the parabola’s direction of opening
steps.content:
From the scatterplot the points form an ∩‑shaped curve, indicating a downward‑opening parabola. For a quadratic $$y = ax^2 + bx + c$$ a downward opening means $$a < 0$$. Therefore the coefficient of $$x^2$$ must be negative. Choices A and C have $$+1.674x^2$$ (positive $$a$$), so they do not match the shape.
That leaves choices B and D — B and D remain.

steps.title: Read the y‑intercept
steps.content:
The scatterplot crosses the vertical axis (year 0) at a value above zero, roughly 700 million MWh. This is the y‑intercept, equal to the constant term $$c$$ in $$y = ax^2 + bx + c$$. Hence $$c > 0$$. Choice B has $$c = -745.73$$, which is negative, so it is eliminated.
Only choice D fits both the downward opening and the positive intercept.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
